name: @soltrade/real-live-readiness
description: REAL-LIVE Readiness Checklist Evaluator (Gate E / E0): pure, in-memory, deterministic aggregation of existing signals into a readiness verdict + blocker list (09-THREAT §7/§7.8). Prerequisite for activate_real_live; never activates. Fail-safe: any missing/unknown input => not ready. No KeyManager; no key material; no signing/sending; no transaction building/serialization; no RPC/provider; no DB; no REAL-LIVE activation; no mechanism-guard carve-out; no execution authority.
